title: Avoid using MULTILINE flag with regex to test for empty lines
description: Using the MULTILINE flag with regex to test for empty lines can lead to missing empty lines. It is recommended to check whether the string is empty instead.
recommendation: Check whether the string is empty instead of using MULTILINE flag with regex to test for empty lines.
impact: Can lead to missing empty lines when using MULTILINE flag with regex.

checks.message: Check whether the string is empty instead of using MULTILINE flag with regex to test for empty lines.
